title: Herobrines Omen
description: Makes all the ominous items,blocks, and effects more ominous by makeing them resemble Herobrine
body:
![HIM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02f97421a531d647892fec5fd7a8d51d5d73e759.gif)
__________________________
Makes the ominous bottles, vaults, spawners, and chiseled deepslate resemble HIM. cause when I first saw the ominous bottle I immidiatly thought of herobrine and the words ominous omen fit herobrines vibe.

Its a way to add HIM to the game without acually changing the game or litterly adding a herobrine entity to the game.
__________________________
